case_title: MOHAMMED AKRAM VS. AMERICAN TRAVEL SOLUTIONS, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-16-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-16-2016 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
